product_name: Hot Wheels TEK Maker Kitz - Motorised Racer Kit

bullets: POWER UP - Now you can power up Hot Wheels Maker Kitz! Assemble the iconic Rodger Dodger adding electric motor, speaker and LED lights – then add the awesome supercharged engine & watch it go!
STEM ACTIVITY - This TEK Maker Kitz is a great introduction to the key principals of the STEM subjects (Science, Technology, Engineering and Maths) for children aged 8 years and above.
EASY TO BUILD - This make your own kit is easy to build requiring no glue or scissors making it a safe and fun activity for children to do independently or with an adult.
OFFICIAL LICENSED HOT WHEELS TOY - This official kit allows children to bring one of the best known Hot Wheels vehicles to life with lights and sounds!
content.description: Now you can power up Hot Wheels Maker Kitz! Assemble the iconic Rodger Dodger adding electric motor, speaker and LED lights – then add the awesome supercharged engine & watch it go! Build, Race & Collect Hot Wheels™ Maker Kitz!

attributes.whats_in_box: 4 x Car Body Panel Kit, 1 x Control Unit, 1 x Electronic Motor Drive Unit & Wheels, 4 x LED Lights, ​1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
